easy.companyDescription: A subscription entertainment company trying to move more of its customer experience online.
easy.macroContext: Broadband use, connected devices, and paid digital media habits are all expanding.
easy.situation: Can a newer delivery model rebuild trust quickly enough to justify rising content and product spending?
easy.longCase: If customers accept the newer model, recurring revenue can scale with broadband and connected-device adoption.
easy.shortCase: A recent trust shock can keep churn elevated while content commitments rise faster than the subscriber base.
setupHints: The old delivery model still contributes cash, but the newer model is where the growth case lives.

medium.companyDescription: A U.S. entertainment company with a recurring-revenue model and a controversial strategic transition.
medium.macroContext: Broadband adoption is rising while consumer tech platforms are becoming more important.
medium.situation: Will a strategic transition rebuild the customer base before higher spending pressures the model?
medium.longCase: A recurring-revenue base could scale if the new delivery model becomes a habit for households.
medium.shortCase: Customer trust and spending discipline are both under pressure during the transition.

hard.companyDescription: A consumer-facing media business attempting a major distribution shift.
hard.macroContext: Digital consumption habits are changing, but investors are unsure which models will win.
hard.situation: Will a new distribution model scale fast enough to offset trust and spending pressure?
hard.longCase: If the model becomes habitual, recurring demand can compound from a much larger household base.
hard.shortCase: If churn stays elevated, fixed commitments can outrun the customer base before the transition pays off.

reveal.shortText: That was Netflix. The market was skeptical, but streaming adoption accelerated.
reveal.funFact: The company's transition looked risky at the time, but it became one of the defining consumer-tech winners of the decade.
whyItMoved: Subscriber growth improved after the trust reset.
The company became a stronger platform business over time.

sources.label: Prototype sample seed
sources.notes: Placeholder sample content for Phase 3 pipeline; not production research.

review.reviewNotes: Prototype/sample seed for Phase 3 schema pipeline. Approximate prices and returns; not Gate 1/Gate 2 production content.
